name: Resource Exhaustion Response
description: Activated when a hub reports depleted status on critical resources (fuel, medical, water). Triggers mutual aid request and re-routing.

steps.action: Query all hubs within 2-hop radius for resource availability
Broadcast ANNOUNCE with depleted resource type and estimated need
Identify nearest hub with 'available' or 'limited' status for needed resource
steps.decision_criteria: minimize transport distance while ensuring supply meets 48h demand

steps.action: Pre-position transport agents along optimal route
Dispatch resource transfer via best available transport
Confirm resource receipt and update hub status to 'limited' or 'available'
Log resource transfer: quantities, origin, destination, transit time, authority chain
